highlights.text: I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “ My lean is we work up it to 6732, 6744, then 6783.” We ripped to 6783 on Monday, and spent Tuesday basing out there, before flushing off this zone 90 points yesterday and going elevator down on a China headline .
The bull case tomorrow is simply that ES can resume up to backtest 6766 again with 6756, 6760 en route.
Readers know though that every Elevator Down sell like we saw yesterday has a sibling in ES.
Specifically - nearly without exception during the last 100 years - every vertical elevator down sell resolves with a Failed Breakdown, and equally violent squeeze.
If we are really melting down, the best setup here is to wait for the Failed Breakdown of yesterday’s 6694 daily low.
We flushed 6698 down to 6690, recovered/Failed Breakdown, ripped into the close.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “At 2pm today, ES put in a Failed Breakdown under 6698 and ripped us higher.

After that if bulls have the momentum, we can head higher to 6782, then we likely head to all time highs after” This played out perfectly and by 9:45AM we hit 6766 exact to the tick, dipped, then cleared it.

post_title: Will CPI Tomorrow De-Rail or Accelerate The SPX Rally? Oct 24 Plan
